nodes.name: Window
nodes.explanation: Root native window backdrop. Not a content layer or Liquid Glass content surface.

raw.name: Window
raw.explanation: Root native window backdrop. Not a content layer or Liquid Glass content surface.

nodes.name: Header
nodes.explanation: Height = padding(8) + content(28) + padding(8) + divider(1) = 45px. Uses flex-row with items-center.

raw.name: Header
raw.explanation: Height = padding(8) + content(28) + padding(8) + divider(1) = 45px. Uses flex-row with items-center.

nodes.name: SearchInput
nodes.explanation: flex-grow:1 fills remaining space. Width = window(750) - padding(16) - buttons_area(236) = 498px. Vertically centered in header.

raw.name: SearchInput
raw.explanation: flex-grow:1 fills remaining space. Width = window(750) - padding(16) - buttons_area(236) = 498px. Vertically centered in header.

nodes.name: ContentArea
nodes.explanation: flex-grow:1 fills remaining height after header. Uses flex-row to create side-by-side panels.

raw.name: ContentArea
raw.explanation: flex-grow:1 fills remaining height after header. Uses flex-row to create side-by-side panels.

nodes.name: ScriptList
nodes.explanation: Width = 375px. Uses uniform_list for virtualized scrolling with 40px item height.

raw.name: ScriptList
raw.explanation: Width = 375px. Uses uniform_list for virtualized scrolling with 40px item height.

nodes.name: PreviewPanel
nodes.explanation: Width = remaining 50% = 375px. Has 16px padding on all sides.

raw.name: PreviewPanel
raw.explanation: Width = remaining 50% = 375px. Has 16px padding on all sides.

nodes.name: ListItem[0]
nodes.explanation: Fixed height = 40px. Uses flex-row with gap:8px for icon + text layout. Padding: 12px vertical, 16px horizontal.

raw.name: ListItem[0]
raw.explanation: Fixed height = 40px. Uses flex-row with gap:8px for icon + text layout. Padding: 12px vertical, 16px horizontal.

nodes.name: LogoButton
nodes.explanation: Fixed 20px width. Positioned at right edge with 16px margin.

raw.name: LogoButton

nodes.name: ActionsButton
nodes.explanation: Width = 85px. Positioned left of logo with 24px spacing (includes divider).
